name: qualia-v4-pointers-empty-state
description: Newly-selected node with no pointers — Properties panel should show the empty-state copy and an '+ Add pointer' button. Tests the Wave A → B authoring surface from the qualia-v4 plan.

checkpoints.name: pointers-empty-state
checkpoints.description: Inspect the right-hand Properties panel. Pass ONLY if you can see all of: (1) the selected node's label/type/subtitle fields populated near the top, (2) a section titled 'Pointers' (uppercase, monospace header) further down the panel, (3) directly under that header, a single line of muted gray text saying that there are no pointers yet (something like 'No pointers. Add one below…'), and (4) a dashed-outline button labeled '+ Add pointer' below that text. Fail if the Pointers section is missing entirely, if the empty-state copy is absent, or if the + Add pointer button is replaced by a populated list of pointer rows. Reasoning should call out which of (1)-(4) was not present.
